appointmentId.title: appointmentId
appointmentId.description: Salesforce record Id of the Service Appointment to cancel. Must belong to the authenticated HCP. Get this from the appointmentId field returned by Get Service Appointments action.

uniqueCode.title: uniqueCode
uniqueCode.description: Unique authentication code of the HCP. Used to verify identity and ensure HCP can only cancel their own appointments. Pass hcpUniqueCode conversation variable here.
